session_1.speaker: Mira
session_1.text: I finally adopted that orange tabby from the shelter on Maple Street last weekend.

session_1.speaker: Theo
session_1.text: Oh nice — what did you name them?

session_1.speaker: Mira
session_1.text: Pumpkin. She's three years old and apparently her favorite toy is a felt mouse.

session_1.speaker: Theo
session_1.text: And the apartment building lets you have pets? I thought your lease said no animals.

session_1.speaker: Mira
session_1.text: I moved into a new place on Elm Avenue in November — this one allows cats up to fifteen pounds.

session_2.speaker: Mira
session_2.text: Great. She mostly sleeps on the windowsill in the living room and chases the felt mouse around at night.

session_2.speaker: Theo
session_2.text: Have you taken her to a vet yet?

session_2.speaker: Mira
session_2.text: Yes, last Friday. The vet on Birch Street said she's healthy and recommended switching to a grain-free food.

qa.question: What is the name of Mira's cat?
Where did Mira adopt her cat from?
What street is Mira's new apartment on, and what is her cat's favorite toy?
